quality_first: default route must include claude, gemini, openai for quality-first readiness
default route must prioritize claude or gemini ahead of openai for quality-first readiness
default route cannot include mock/local for quality-first readiness
generation route must include both claude and gemini for quality-first readiness
generation route must prioritize claude or gemini first for quality-first readiness
generation route cannot include mock/local for quality-first readiness
attachment route must include both claude and gemini for quality-first readiness
attachment route must prioritize gemini or claude first for quality-first readiness
attachment route cannot include mock/local for quality-first readiness
visual route must be exactly openai because direct visual asset generation is only implemented for OpenAI in this deployment
